parsedJson.summary: Functional layout with outdated visual styling, poor CTA hierarchy, and weak hero imagery that undermines professional credibility.

issues.title: Generic stock photo lacks Brisbane localization
issues.what_observed: The hero section shows a tradesperson with a white van in front of a generic suburban house — the image looks like stock photography with no visible Queensland Roofing branding on the van or any Brisbane-specific landmarks
issues.why_problem: A local searcher looking for a Brisbane roofer can't tell if this business actually operates in their area; the generic imagery makes it look like a template site that could be anywhere in Australia, reducing trust that they'll show up for the job
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero photo showing an actual Queensland Roofing crew on a recognizable Brisbane roof (Queenslander-style home, visible local suburb), with branded van and company uniforms visible, shot in natural Queensland light
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Commission on-site photography of real Queensland Roofing jobs in Brisbane suburbs, ensuring branded vehicles and local architectural styles are prominent in hero imagery
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首页的主图看起来像是通用的库存照片，看不出是布里斯班的真实施工现场，也看不到贵公司的品牌标识
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索的客户会怀疑这是否是真正在布里斯班营业的公司，而不是模板网站。研究显示，缺乏本地化证据会让 60% 的访客直接离开去找下一家

issues.title: Primary CTA button lacks visual prominence
issues.what_observed: The bright lime-green quote form on the right side is the most visually dominant element, but the actual phone number (0450 263 653) in the blue header bar is small white text that blends into the background
issues.why_problem: Most local searchers want to call immediately rather than fill a form; the phone number should be the most prominent conversion path but it's currently competing for attention with the green form box, causing visitors to miss the faster action
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Large, high-contrast phone button (coral or orange on white) positioned above the fold on both desktop and mobile, minimum 44px touch target, with supporting text like 'Call Now for Free Quote' — form remains visible but secondary
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Redesign header with prominent click-to-call button as primary CTA; move quote form below hero or make it a secondary CTA; ensure phone action is visually dominant across all viewports
issues.plain_explanation: 电话号码在页面顶部很小，容易被忽略，而绿色的表单框反而太显眼。大多数客户其实想直接打电话，而不是填表格
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索客户中有 70% 更倾向于直接致电。如果电话按钮不够显眼，他们会认为联系太麻烦而去找竞争对手。每 10 个访客中可能流失 3-4 个

issues.title: Saturated blue header feels dated and generic
issues.what_observed: The header uses a solid bright cyan-blue background (#0099CC approximate) spanning full width with white text and a script-font tagline ('Family crafted, family cared') — this color scheme and full-bleed approach was common in 2012-2015 WordPress themes
issues.why_problem: The saturated blue makes the site look like an outdated template rather than a modern local business; younger homeowners (30-45, key renovation demographic) associate this style with sites that haven't been updated in years, suggesting the business may not be current or tech-savvy
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Clean white or light neutral header with logo left-aligned, simple sans-serif navigation, and phone CTA right-aligned; single accent color (e.g. coral, deep teal) used sparingly for CTA only; no full-bleed colored backgrounds in header
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace colored header bar with white/off-white background, relocate tagline to hero subheading, simplify navigation to 4-5 clear labels, make phone number a colored button instead of plain text
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部的蓝色背景条看起来像 10 年前的老式网站模板，会让客户觉得公司可能不够与时俱进
issues.customer_impact: 访客在 8 秒内形成第一印象。过时的设计会让 40% 的客户质疑公司是否还在正常营业，或者技术和施工方法是否落后

issues.title: Three-column icon section creates visual clutter
issues.what_observed: Below the hero are three blue boxes with checkmarks and dense paragraph text ('Same people we all share...', 'Quick & free quotes...', 'Free no phone quotes...') — the text is small, left-aligned, and difficult to scan quickly
issues.why_problem: Visitors in the awareness stage scan rather than read; three dense paragraphs side-by-side with similar styling cause cognitive overload, making it unclear what the key differentiators are or why they should choose this business
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Single-column trust section with 3-4 short bullet benefits (e.g. '30+ Years Brisbane Roofing', 'Free Quote Within 24hrs', 'Fully Licensed & Insured') using large, scannable text with supporting icons; each benefit one line maximum
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Consolidate into single-column benefit list below hero, use 18px+ text for benefit headlines, eliminate paragraph descriptions or move to separate 'Why Choose Us' section lower on page
issues.plain_explanation: 首页中部有三个蓝色方框，里面的文字太多太密，客户很难快速看懂你们的优势是什么
issues.customer_impact: 客户通常只会扫视页面而不是仔细阅读。如果优势说明太复杂，80% 的访客会直接跳过，错过了解你们专业资质和快速报价服务的机会

issues.title: Bright lime-green form box clashes with brand colors
issues.what_observed: The quote form on the right uses a bright lime-green background (#AADD00 approximate) with red asterisks for required fields — this green doesn't appear anywhere else on the page and clashes with the blue header
issues.why_problem: The jarring color contrast makes the form feel like a third-party widget rather than part of the brand; the aggressive lime green can feel pushy or spammy to visitors who aren't ready to commit, potentially triggering a defensive 'not now' reaction
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Form with white or very light background, subtle border, single accent color for submit button that matches primary brand color; required field indicators in gray text rather than red asterisks; professional typography hierarchy
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Redesign form with neutral background, reduce visual weight, use single brand-consistent accent color for submit button only, move form to secondary position or modal to reduce pressure
issues.plain_explanation: 右侧绿色表单框的颜色过于鲜艳刺眼，和页面其他部分不协调，看起来像是外挂的第三方广告
issues.customer_impact: 过于醒目的表单会让还在了解阶段的客户感到压力，可能引起反感。研究显示，过于激进的表单设计会让 25% 的访客提前离开

positive_observations: Phone number is visible in header (0450 263 653) — just needs better visual prominence
Quote form is above the fold and captures leads — design needs refinement but the placement intent is correct
Includes trust-building elements (checkmarks, benefit statements) — execution needs simplification but foundation is present
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace generic hero photo with authentic Brisbane job site imagery showing branded crew and local architecture
2. Make phone number the dominant CTA with large, high-contrast click-to-call button; reduce form prominence
3. Modernize header design with white background, simplified navigation, and single accent color used sparingly
